overview: Enablement Quest: The Learning Systems Lab is a top-down RPG-style learning experience where players investigate workplace performance problems, talk to stakeholders, inspect evidence, diagnose root causes, choose enablement interventions, and earn business-impact canvases.
features: Top-down tile-based game canvas with player movement
Reviewer-facing title screen with creator attribution and a 5-minute review guide
Learning Systems Lab, organization hub, Operations Suite, and Sales Strategy Studio scenes
Stakeholder dialogue with Maya, Leo, and supporting workplace characters
Two guided case studies: onboarding performance and stalled sales demo conversion
Evidence collection, root-cause diagnosis, intervention selection, and impact review
Earned artifacts: Enablement Diagnostic Canvas and Sales Enablement Impact Canvas
Guide, backpack, settings, keyboard controls, and mobile joystick controls
Responsive game canvas scaling for desktop and mobile play
